Morgan Stanley Agrees To Pay $15M Penalty To Settle SEC Charges Over Advisors Stealing Client Funds
data.description: Morgan Stanley Smith Barney LLC has agreed to pay a $15 million penalty to settle Securities and Exchange Commission charges for failing to prevent four financial advisors from stealing millions in client funds, the SEC announced Monday, Dec. 9, 2024.

data.title: Trump Plays Presidential Immunity Card In Truth Social Lawsuit Battle
data.description: Donald Trump is seeking presidential immunity to pause a lawsuit over alleged unfair dilution of stakes in Trump Media & Technology Group, citing presidential privilege in a case involving former "The Apprentice" contestants.
